creator: ds@ukrhub.net
text:
There's an article doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/articles/geom-class in
	The FreeBSD Documentation Project. There's a translation to russian
	available outside the Project. Could anyone add the translation
	to the Project?

Fix: 

Fetch http://chaos.ukrhub.net/geom-class/doc.ru.articles.geom-class.tbz
	uncompress and drop to the proper directory.
How-To-Repeat: 	Just check the docs repository.
